## Requirements

<!-- Link REQUIREMENTS.md IDs: FR-*, SEC-*, etc. -->

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, keys, wallet material, or `.env` files
- [ ] No hardcoded user paths (`C:/Users/`, OneDrive)
- [ ] Privileged actions still gated (if agent code changed)
- [ ] No AGPL components added to default binary

## Test plan

- [ ] Local verification steps documented
- [ ] Gateway health checked (if agent-related)

## Trademark / legal

- [ ] No incorrect "Storm Browser" product naming
- [ ] Third-party notices updated (if OSS deps added)
